text_zh: 太棒了，等不及下一次了
reply_original: Wow, thank you so much! Reading your review made our day. We are so happy you are enjoying your time with Fantasia. We have some amazing new updates and characters coming up soon, so stay tuned! If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. See you in the next adventure!
reply_zh: 哇，太感谢了！读到你的评价让我们开心极了。我们非常高兴你能在 Fantasia 玩得开心。我们很快就会推出一些超棒的新更新和新角色，敬请期待！如果你有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。下一次冒险见！
